name: git_stash
description: Manages git stashes with structured list, push, apply, pop, drop, show, clear, and branch actions. Returns typed stash metadata including per-file statistics via numstat parsing.

message.description: Message for the new stash (push action only).

include_untracked.description: Include untracked files in the stash (push action only).

keep_index.description: Keep changes in the index after stashing (push action only).

stash_index.description: Index of the stash to target (apply, pop, drop, show, branch).

branch_name.description: Name of the branch to create from a stash (branch action only).

max_results.description: Maximum number of stashes to return (list action only).

quiet.description: Suppress non-error output for mutating actions.

include_patch.description: Show full patch diff instead of numstat for show action.

total_stashes.description: Number of stash entries returned in the stashes array.

stashes.description: Stash entries. For list action includes metadata; for show action includes per-file stats.

message.description: Stash message. May be empty for show action.

hash.description: Commit hash of the stash. May be empty for fallback parsing.

date.description: ISO 8601 committer date. May be empty for fallback parsing.

date_relative.description: Human-readable relative date. May be empty for fallback parsing.

files.description: Per-file statistics from numstat. Present for show action when include_patch is false.

truncated.description: True if the result was truncated due to max_results.

created.description: Present for push action when a stash was created.

applied.description: Present for apply/pop actions when stash was applied.

dropped.description: Present for pop/drop actions when stash was removed.

cleared.description: Present for clear action when all stashes were removed.

branched.description: Present for branch action when a branch was created.

branch_name.description: Present for branch action with the created branch name.

args: {% if action == 'list' %}list{% elif action == 'push' %}push{% elif action == 'apply' %}apply{% elif action == 'pop' %}pop{% elif action == 'drop' %}drop{% elif action == 'show' %}show{% elif action == 'clear' %}clear{% elif action == 'branch' %}branch{% endif %}
{% if action == 'push' and message %}-m {{ message }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'show' and not include_patch %}--numstat{% endif %}
{% if action in ['apply','pop','drop','show'] %}{% set stash_ref = 'stash@{' ~ stash_index ~ '}' %}{{ stash_ref }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'branch' and branch_name %}{{ branch_name }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'branch' and stash_index is not none %}{% set stash_ref = 'stash@{' ~ stash_index ~ '}' %}{{ stash_ref }}{% endif %}

pipeline.description: Parse git stash list structured output or show numstat lines into typed stash objects. Includes fallback parsing for plaintext stash@{N}: message format.
Enforce max_results cap on the stashes array.
Merge parsed stashes, action metadata, and action-specific flags into the success envelope.

args: {% if action == 'list' %}list{% elif action == 'push' %}push{% elif action == 'apply' %}apply{% elif action == 'pop' %}pop{% elif action == 'drop' %}drop{% elif action == 'show' %}show{% elif action == 'clear' %}clear{% elif action == 'branch' %}branch{% endif %}
{% if action == 'push' and message %}-m {{ message }}{% endif %}
{% if action in ['apply','pop','drop','show'] %}{% set stash_ref = 'stash@{' ~ stash_index ~ '}' %}{{ stash_ref }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'branch' and branch_name %}{{ branch_name }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'branch' and stash_index is not none %}{% set stash_ref = 'stash@{' ~ stash_index ~ '}' %}{{ stash_ref }}{% endif %}
output_gaps: stash list lacks structured format; dates and hashes may be unavailable
numstat parsing unavailable for show action in fallback mode

compatible_downstream.description: Diff files referenced in a stash entry.
Check working tree status after applying or popping a stash.

compatible_upstream.description: Check for uncommitted changes before stashing.
